member.name: T:DbLocator.DbLocator
member.summary: DbLocator class is the main class that is used to interact with the DbLocator database.

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Constructor for DbLocator class

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.AddTenant(System.String,System.String,DbLocator.Domain.Status)
member.summary: Add Tenant to DbLocator database

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.GetTenants
member.summary: Get Tenants

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.UpdateTenant(System.Int32,System.String,System.String,DbLocator.Domain.Status)
member.summary: Update Tenant information in DbLocator database

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.DeleteTenant(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete Tenant from DbLocator database

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.GetConnection(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Create SQL connection based on user, Tenant and database type

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.GetConnections
member.summary: Get connections from DbLocator database

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.AddConnection(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Add connection to DbLocator database

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.DeleteConnection(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete connection from DbLocator database

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.AddDatabase(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Byte,DbLocator.Domain.Status)
member.summary: Insert database record and create new database on specified server with the user provided

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.AddDatabase(System.String,System.Int32,System.Byte,DbLocator.Domain.Status,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Insert database record and create new database on specified server if createDatabase is true and use trusted connection

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.AddDatabase(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Byte)
member.summary: Insert database record and create new database on specified server with the user provided

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.AddDatabase(System.String,System.Int32,System.Byte)
member.remarks: Insert database record and create new database on specified server and use trusted connection

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.GetDatabases
member.summary: Get databases

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.UpdateDatabase(System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Byte,DbLocator.Domain.Status)
member.summary: Update database information in DbLocator database and make updates on database server

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.DeleteDatabase(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete database information from DbLocator database and on server it lives on

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.AddDatabaseServer(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Add database server to DbLocator database.
member.param: IP address of the database server
member.remarks: This method will not create a new database server. It will only add a record in the DbLocator database.

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.GetDatabaseServers
member.summary: Get database servers from DbLocator database

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.UpdateDatabaseServer(System.Int32,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Update database server information in DbLocator database
member.param: IP address of the database server

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.DeleteDatabaseServer(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete database server information from DbLocator database

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.AddDatabaseType(System.String)
member.summary: Add database type to DbLocator database

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.GetDatabaseTypes
member.summary: Get database types from DbLocator database

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.UpdateDatabaseType(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Update database type information in DbLocator database

member.name: M:DbLocator.DbLocator.DeleteDatabaseType(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete database type from DbLocator database

member.name: T:DbLocator.Domain.Connection
member.summary: Represents a connection to a database.
member.param: The unique identifier for the connection.

member.name: M:DbLocator.Domain.Connection.#ctor(System.Int32,DbLocator.Domain.Database,DbLocator.Domain.Tenant)
member.summary: Represents a connection to a database.
member.param: The unique identifier for the connection.

member.name: P:DbLocator.Domain.Connection.Id
member.summary: Gets the unique identifier for the connection.

member.name: P:DbLocator.Domain.Connection.Database
member.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the database.

member.name: P:DbLocator.Domain.Connection.Tenant
member.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the tenant.

member.name: T:DbLocator.Domain.Database
member.summary: Represents a database.

member.name: M:DbLocator.Domain.Database.#ctor(System.Int32,System.String,DbLocator.Domain.DatabaseType,DbLocator.Domain.DatabaseServer,DbLocator.Domain.Status,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Represents a database.

member.name: P:DbLocator.Domain.Database.Id
member.summary: Gets the database ID.

member.name: P:DbLocator.Domain.Database.Name
member.summary: Gets the name of the database.

member.name: P:DbLocator.Domain.Database.Type
member.summary: Gets or sets the database type.

member.name: P:DbLocator.Domain.Database.Server
member.summary: Gets the ID of the database server.

member.name: P:DbLocator.Domain.Database.Status
member.summary: Gets or sets the status of the database.

member.name: P:DbLocator.Domain.Database.UseTrustedConnection
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to use a trusted connection.
member.value: true if a trusted connection should be used; otherwise, false.
member.remarks: If true, the database user and password are ignored.

member.name: T:DbLocator.Domain.DatabaseServer
member.summary: Represents a database server.
member.param: The unique identifier of the database server.
The name of the database server.
The IP address of the database server.

member.summary: Represents a database server.

The name of the database server.
The IP address of the database server.

member.summary: Gets the unique identifier of the database server.

member.summary: Gets the name of the database server.

member.name: P:DbLocator.Domain.DatabaseServer.IpAddress
member.summary: Gets the IP address of the database server.

member.summary: Represents a type of database.

member.summary: Gets the name of the database type.

member.summary: Represents the status of an entity.

member.summary: The entity is active.

member.name: F:DbLocator.Domain.Status.Inactive
member.summary: The entity is inactive.

member.summary: Represents a Tenant with an ID, name, code, and status.

member.summary: Represents a Tenant with an ID, name, code, and status.
